titleEn: Presenting Greenhouse Grower’s 2026 Technology of the Year Finalists
titleZh: 2026年温室种植者年度技术奖入围名单揭晓
summaryZh: 本文介绍了2026年温室种植者年度技术奖的三项入围技术：Air Tray Technologies通过空气修剪根系改善根质量和生产效率；PARPerfect Shading System实现动态精准光照控制，提升作物均匀性和光利用效率；Pot-in-Tray Machine自动化装盆入盘，大幅提高温室作业效率。这些技术虽聚焦园艺温室场景，但其自动化、传感器控制、精准环境管理等理念对智慧畜牧行业（如环境调控、自动化作业）具有跨领域借鉴价值。
featuredReason: 虽然聚焦园艺温室，但三项技术分别涉及根系环境优化、动态光照精准控制、自动化作业，其传感器、AI决策、机器人自动化等核心逻辑与智慧畜牧中的环境调控、饲喂机器人、数据驱动管理高度相通，可为畜牧从业者提供跨领域创新启发。
contentFull: By Brian D. Sparks|June 26, 2026 Greenhouse Grower will give out several awards at the Evening of Excellence during Cultivate’ 26 on July 13. Here’s your chance to get to know the finalists for this year’s Technology of the Year award before the winner is announced. Air Tray Technologies (Blackmore Co.) Air Tray Technologies gives growers a practical way to improve root quality, crop uniformity, and production efficiency without revamping growing system completely. It targets a core issue in our industry: inefficient root development due to continued use of the traditional round container which causes roots to circle. By encouraging air-pruned, fibrous root system, Air Tray helps plants establish faster after transplant, recover more consistently, and use water and nutrients more efficiently. By promoting air-pruned, fibrous, non-circling roots, Air Tray helps create a more efficient plant from the beginning of production. It improves oxygen exchange in the root zone, reduces overly wet conditions, and supports more consistent establishment after transplanting or shifting. The technology is also flexible, with multiple tray and container sizes that apply across horticultural and agricultural crops, including ornamentals, trees, shrubs, citrus, and viticulture. PARPerfect Shading System (Svensson) Top Articles Read More Read More Read More Read More Read More 3 New All-America Selections Winners Announced for 2027 PARperfect advances greenhouse light management from fixed or reactive shading methods to dynamic, precision-based control of photosynthetically active radiation (PAR). It enables continuous adjustment of shading levels in response to changing outdoor radiation and crop requirements, and uses a dual screen configuration that pairs a highly diffusive Harmony PARperfect climate screen with a variable shading screen, allowing gradual control of screen positions from approximately 20% to 100% throughout the day. This design enables growers to stabilize PAR levels while avoiding spikes of direct sunlight that can cause crop stress, leaf damage, or uneven development. Over the past several years, adoption of PARperfect has supported improved light uniformity, higher usable cumulative light, and more consistent growing conditions, particularly in floriculture crops that are sensitive to light extremes. Pot-in-Tray Machine (BOLD Robotic Solutions) The Pot-In-Tray Machine is an efficient, reliable solution to one of the industry’s most repetitive, time-consuming tasks. By automating the task of loading pots into trays at high-speed, BOLD has helped greenhouses cut back on unproductive overhead and operational volatility. The Pot-In-Tray Machine’s compact design maximizes tight workspace efficiency without sacrificing power, delivering a high-speed output of up to 15 trays per minute. Fast modular changeovers allow for effortless transitions between sizes, creating a streamlined workflow that requires minimal manual intervention. The machine also offers an open-access design that simplifies maintenance and ensures the mechanics are always easy to reach and service. 1 1 5 Presenting Greenhouse Grower’s 2026 Technology of the Year Finalists Subscribe to eNewsletter Subscribe Brian D. Sparks is Editor of Greenhouse Grower and GreenhouseGrower.com. See all author stories here.
translationZh:
温室种植者将在7月13日Cultivate'26的卓越之夜颁发多个奖项。在获奖者公布之前，您有机会了解今年年度技术奖的入围者。

**Air Tray Technologies（Blackmore公司）**

Air Tray Technologies为种植者提供了一种实用的方法，无需彻底改造种植系统即可改善根系质量、作物均匀性和生产效率。它针对我们行业的一个核心问题：由于持续使用传统圆形容器导致根系盘旋，从而造成根系发育效率低下。通过促进空气修剪的纤维状根系系统，Air Tray帮助植物在移栽后更快定植、更一致地恢复，并更高效地利用水分和养分。通过促进空气修剪的、纤维状的、非盘旋的根系，Air Tray有助于从生产初期就培育出更高效的植物。它改善了根区的氧气交换，减少了过湿条件，并支持移栽或换盆后更一致的定植。该技术还非常灵活，提供多种托盘和容器尺寸，适用于园艺和农业作物，包括观赏植物、树木、灌木、柑橘和葡萄栽培。

**PARPerfect Shading System（Svensson公司）**

PARperfect将温室光照管理从固定或反应性遮光方法推进到基于光合有效辐射（PAR）的动态、精准控制。它能够根据室外辐射变化和作物需求连续调整遮光水平，并采用双层幕布配置，将高散射性的Harmony PARperfect气候幕布与可变遮光幕布配对，实现全天幕布位置从约20%到100%的渐进控制。这种设计使种植者能够稳定PAR水平，同时避免可能导致作物胁迫、叶片损伤或不均匀生长的直射阳光峰值。过去几年中，PARperfect的采用支持了更好的光照均匀性、更高的可用累积光照以及更一致的生长条件，尤其适用于对极端光照敏感的观赏花卉作物。

**Pot-in-Tray Machine（BOLD Robotic Solutions公司）**

Pot-In-Tray Machine是一种高效、可靠的解决方案，针对行业中重复性最高、最耗时的任务之一。通过自动化将花盆高速装入托盘的过程，BOLD帮助温室减少了非生产性开销和运营波动。Pot-In-Tray Machine的紧凑设计在保持强大性能的同时，最大限度地提高了狭小工作空间的效率，高速输出可达每分钟15个托盘。快速模块化换型允许在不同尺寸之间轻松切换，创建了需要最少人工干预的简化工作流程。该机器还
author: Brian Sparks
contentHtml:
Here’s your chance to get to know the finalists for this year’s Technology of the Year award before the winner is announced during Evening of Excellence at Cultivate’26.
The post Presenting Greenhouse Grower’s 2026 Technology of the Year Finalists appeared first on Greenhouse Grower.
